TC-S5-008-01.description: Drag and drop .eml file into case folder, verify file uploaded successfully

TC-S5-008-02.description: Click .eml file in document tree, verify EmailViewer displays with headers

TC-S5-008-03.description: Email in Arabic, verify RTL text rendered correctly

TC-S5-008-04.description: Verify email metadata (From, To, Subject, Date) displayed in header section

TC-S5-008-05.description: Email with HTML body, verify HTML converted to formatted text

TC-S5-008-06.description: Email with plain text body, verify text displayed with whitespace preserved

TC-S5-008-07.description: Email with attachments, verify attachments listed at bottom

TC-S5-008-08.description: Click Translate on email, verify new render created with German translation

TC-S5-008-09.description: Translated email retains original headers (From, To, Date unchanged)

TC-S5-008-10.description: Translated email has translated subject and body in German

TC-S5-008-11.description: Email subject in Arabic, translate to German, verify correct translation

TC-S5-008-12.description: Upload invalid .eml file, verify error message displayed

TC-S5-008-13.description: Email with no subject, verify 'No Subject' displayed

TC-S5-008-14.description: Use /fill-form on email content, verify form fields populated from email text
